title: pimpinella gilanica
intro: Pimpinella gilanica, also known as Zereshk or dried barberries, is a type of flowering plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae) native to Iran. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions due to their high content of alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Pimpinella gilanica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and exhibit antioxidant and antimicrobial activities, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. The seeds can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and are also used in herbal infusions and decoctions to leverage its medicinal properties.
